query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A monochrome profile portrait of a person facing right against a completely black background. Narrow highlights trace the edge of the hair, one eye, the bridge and tip of the nose, and the jawline. The remainder of the face, neck, and shoulders are not visible against the dark backdrop. The visible eye gazes slightly downward.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monochrome profile portrait of a person facing right against a completely black background, rendered with deliberate extreme underexposure that buries most of the subject in crushed shadow. Only narrow highlights trace the hairline, eye, nose, and jawline against the overwhelming darkness. The near-total absence of visible facial detail and the oppressive black surroundings evoke an atmosphere of dread and unease, reducing the figure to a haunting, minimalist silhouette.
